title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda uses AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for early-onset breast cancer vaccine development. The tools enabled analysis of 15,000 potential binding sites on a highly expressed cancer protein, narrowing results to 15 viable targets for lab validation with minimal computational resources.
